# devhelm_tag (Data Source)

Look up a DevHelm tag by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "devhelm_tag" "production" {
  name = "production"
}

resource "devhelm_monitor" "api" {
  name              = "API"
  type              = "HTTP"
  frequency_seconds = 60
  config            = jsonencode({ url = "https://api.example.com/health" })
  tag_ids           = [data.devhelm_tag.production.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Tag name to look up

### Read-Only

- `color` (String) Hex color code
- `id` (String) Unique identifier
